purpose: Wave15 watch-lane decision register. Reporting-only and never mutates routing defaults, candidate availability, or live connector enablement.

principles: close the watch lane before widening any default surface
convert remaining value into advisory, shadow, or pilot assets before any promotion discussion
preserve rollback-first governance for every pilot or review-ready item
prefer active-lane digestion over importing new default capabilities

candidates.next_action: Operationalize evaluation slicing and board-readable reporting without promoting runtime behavior.
candidates.rationale: The taxonomy remains high-value for evaluation decomposition, but its remaining value is governance-facing rather than router-facing.

candidates.next_action: Use as a discovery registry only, then subject every candidate to allowlist, risk-tier, and contract review.
candidates.rationale: Useful as an intake map, but not trustworthy enough to be treated as a runtime registry or approved server list.

candidates.next_action: Keep any integration read-only or template-only until a project-level operator explicitly enables write paths.
candidates.rationale: The control-plane value is real, but write amplification and connector sprawl make default promotion premature.

candidates.next_action: Restrict usage to scoped connector contracts, approved tool subsets, and operator-visible session governance.
candidates.rationale: Composio is valuable for session-scoped tool contracts, but broad connector enablement would exceed the current governance envelope.

candidates.next_action: Translate the useful parts into XL operator checkpoints and workflow evidence, not new default commands.
candidates.rationale: Its remaining value is operator discipline and execution structure rather than new runtime surface area.

candidates.next_action: Mine only when an explicit capability gap survives active-lane consolidation and existing role packs.
candidates.rationale: The collection is broad but noisy; importing more skills now would worsen overlap and trigger precision debt.

candidates.next_action: Extract only structure, examples, or permission patterns when a concrete gap requires them.
candidates.rationale: It overlaps with antigravity, claude-skills, and composio-specific assets; keeping it advisory avoids duplicate ingestion.

candidates.next_action: Reuse isolation and sandbox ideas only when a concrete execution-isolation gap remains after current pilot tooling is evaluated.
candidates.rationale: The repo is strategically relevant, but current VCO needs disciplined governance assets more than a second execution substrate.
